devdoc.details: Demonstrates reading the free memory pointer before and after allocation in a single function call.

returns.pointerAfter: The free memory pointer after allocation (e.g., 0x100).
returns.pointerBefore: The free memory pointer before allocation (e.g., 0x80).

devdoc.title: MemoryDemo

evm.assembly:
/* "contracts/evm/memory/3.freememorypointer2.sol":206:1221  contract MemoryDemo {... */
  mstore(0x40, 0x80)
  callvalue
  dup1
  iszero
  tag_1
  jumpi
  revert(0x00, 0x00)
tag_1:
  pop
  dataSize(sub_0)
  dup1
  dataOffset(sub_0)
  0x00
  codecopy
  0x00
  return
stop
